properties.notes:
Section 2. Under construction, opening Spring 2027. Single entrance at SW corner of Wilshire & Reeves Drive (north portal canceled per Metro Board Report 2024-0521). Also informally called "Beverly Drive Station" by City of Beverly Hills. Located on Wilshire between Beverly Drive and Rodeo Drive.  Note: SB 79's ½-mile TOD zone provisions do not apply to 
Beverly Hills due to the city's population being below 35,000

Section 2. Under construction. Located at north corner of Constellation Boulevard and Avenue of the Stars. Construction visible above ground including escalators (Streetsblog photo essay, March 2026). Construction pit currently occupies former Constellation Boulevard alignment. Within City of LA jurisdiction (per Metro Board Report 2024-0521). Projected to open Spring 2027.
